name: AI Content Marked
description: AI-generated client-facing content is marked or labelled as AI-generated/synthetic.
rationale: IOSCO Table 5.1: 'Provide examples of how outputs are marked as AI-generated or synthetic.' Machine-readable labels on AI-generated content. A flag (Amber) where labelling is missing.

examples.fails: AI-generated client content with no AI-generated label

source: IOSCO FR/02/2026 — Supervisory Toolkit for AI Use in Capital Markets (May 2026), Ch.3 Tables 5 (Disclosure) and 6 (Recordkeeping & reporting).
